$comment: Sintrix sits on top of ha-mcp (https://github.com/homeassistant-ai/ha-mcp).
DEFAULT below = local stdio server ('uvx ha-mcp') running on the integrator's machine and connecting
to the house over the network via HOMEASSISTANT_URL + HOMEASSISTANT_TOKEN. Works for BOTH
remote and on-site houses — just point the URL at the right Home Assistant. The builder flags
belong here (env) because the server runs locally; they are governed by project/02-guardrails.md.
Values are read from your environment (e.g. export them, or load .env). Keep secrets in .env
(untracked) — never hard-code the token here. See .env.example.
ALTERNATIVE = HA add-on / remote HTTP: replace this server with
{ "type": "http", "url": "<MCP URL from add-on logs>" } and enable the feature flags
in the add-on's settings panel instead of here. Use the ha-mcp setup wizard for exact values:
